title: Senior Teacher - BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates family as a Senior Teacher in Vadodara. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates:
BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BSC Academy Asia Pacific Associates!
